explainer: All of our events are held at Venue MOT unless otherwise specified on the event poster. Single room parties are in Unit 20.

units.title: UNIT 18
paragraphs: The entrance to Unit 18 opens outwards and is 78cm wide, with an 8cm step. It opens onto a small hallway, leading to the second door which is step free and 70cm wide. This door leads to the venue floor and has step free access to the bar and bathroom.

The bathroom has an 80cm wide entrance to a small room with a sink. There is a plastic curtain covering the entrance to the cubicles, which is 81cm wide. There are 4 small cubicles with doors opening inwards.

The outdoor smoking area is located on the other side of Unit 18, by the DJ booth. The door is 67cm wide and step free, leading to a small hallway. The second door is 90cm wide with a 5cm step to the outdoor smoking area. This area has a combination of seating benches, mostly without back support.

units.title: UNIT 20
paragraphs: On the way to the entrance door, there is a sidewalk which is 88cm wide.

The entrance door to Unit 20 opens outwards and is 67cm wide. There is a concrete incline to the door and a 8cm step. The venue does not have a wheelchair ramp. This door enters into a small hallway with a cloakroom on the left side. There is another door leading onto the venue floor, it is step free and 70cm wide. There is step free access from there to the bar and the toilets.
There will be some stools available for seating in the bar area.

The toilet door is 68cm wide and leads to a small room with a sink. There is another door to the cubicles, which is step free and 80cm wide. In the bathrooms, there are 3 small cubicles with swinging doors opening inwards. There is also one bigger toilet with step free access and a 66cm wide door, which opens inwards. The toilet is 125cm by 200cm and does not have a rail.

The entrance to the club from the bar is through a heavy black curtain. The outdoor smoking area is located on the other side of Unit 20, by the DJ booth. The door to the smoking area is 69cm wide, step free, and leads to a small hallway. Then, there is another door, which is 87cm wide and covered with a plastic curtain, with a 6cm step, leading to the outdoor smoking area. This area has a combination of seating benches, mostly without back support.
